message.content:
你是 CodeConnect Phase 4-5 服务层实现者。实现 services 和 diff crate。

## 项目根目录
F:\_其他\code-connect

## 已完成的底层模块
- codeconnect-core: types, symbol_id, error, response
- codeconnect-index: TantivyIndex, SledStore, FullIndexer, QueryEngine
- codeconnect-graph: CallGraph, DependencyGraph, CycleDetector, TypeHierarchy, metrics

## 实现 services crate（6 文件）

### crates/services/src/symbol_service.rs
wrap QueryEngine，提供 search/search_by_id/batch_resolve

### crates/services/src/call_analyzer.rs
wrap CallGraph（从 SledStore 构建），提供 trace_callers/trace_callees/find_references

### crates/services/src/impact_analyzer.rs
从 SledStore 构建 CallGraph → 对 changed_symbols 做 BFS trace_callers → 按距离分类 direct_caller/transitive → 返回影响面

### crates/services/src/semantic_search.rs
search_pattern + find_similar（基于 tantivy 全文搜索）

### crates/services/src/arch_query.rs
get_dependency_graph + detect_cycles + check_rules

### crates/services/src/deadcode.rs + metrics.rs
thin wrappers over graph::metrics

## 实现 diff crate（2 文件）

### crates/diff/src/branch_diff.rs
用 git2 比较两个 ref，返回变更文件列表

### crates/diff/src/symbol_diff.rs
行级 diff → 符号范围映射

## 要求
- 读现有代码确保 API 一致
- 所有注释中文
- cargo check 零错误

content.text:
Base directory for this skill: C:\Users\Administrator\.claude\skills\subagent-driven-development

# Subagent-Driven Development

Execute plan by dispatching fresh subagent per task, with two-stage review after each: spec compliance review first, then code quality review.

**Why subagents:** You delegate tasks to specialized agents with isolated context. By precisely crafting their instructions and context, you ensure they stay focused and succeed at their task. They should never inherit your session's context or history — you construct exactly what they need. This also preserves your own context for coordination work.

**Core principle:** Fresh subagent per task + two-stage review (spec then quality) = high quality, fast iteration

## When to Use

```dot
digraph when_to_use {
    "Have implementation plan?" [shape=diamond];
    "Tasks mostly independent?" [shape=diamond];
    "Stay in this session?" [shape=diamond];
    "subagent-driven-development" [shape=box];
    "executing-plans" [shape=box];
    "Manual execution or brainstorm first" [shape=box];

    "Have implementation plan?" -> "Tasks mostly independent?" [label="yes"];
    "Have implementation plan?" -> "Manual execution or brainstorm first" [label="no"];
    "Tasks mostly independent?" -> "Stay in this session?" [label="yes"];
    "Tasks mostly independent?" -> "Manual execution or brainstorm first" [label="no - tightly coupled"];
    "Stay in this session?" -> "subagent-driven-development" [label="yes"];
    "Stay in this session?" -> "executing-plans" [label="no - parallel session"];
}
```

**vs. Executing Plans (parallel session):**
- Same session (no context switch)
- Fresh subagent per task (no context pollution)
- Two-stage review after each task: spec compliance first, then code quality
- Faster iteration (no human-in-loop between tasks)

## The Process

```dot
digraph process {
    rankdir=TB;

    subgraph cluster_per_task {
        label="Per Task";
        "Dispatch implementer subagent (./implementer-prompt.md)" [shape=box];
        "Implementer subagent asks questions?" [shape=diamond];
        "Answer questions, provide context" [shape=box];
        "Implementer subagent implements, tests, commits, self-reviews" [shape=box];
        "Dispatch spec reviewer subagent (./spec-reviewer-prompt.md)" [shape=box];
        "Spec reviewer subagent confirms code matches spec?" [shape=diamond];
        "Implementer subagent fixes spec gaps" [shape=box];
        "Dispatch code quality reviewer subagent (./code-quality-reviewer-prompt.md)" [shape=box];
        "Code quality reviewer subagent approves?" [shape=diamond];
        "Implementer subagent fixes quality issues" [shape=box];
        "Mark task complete in TodoWrite" [shape=box];
    }

    "Read plan, extract all tasks with full text, note context, create TodoWrite" [shape=box];
    "More tasks remain?" [shape=diamond];
    "Dispatch final code reviewer subagent for entire implementation" [shape=box];
    "Use superpowers:finishing-a-development-branch" [shape=box style=filled fillcolor=lightgreen];

    "Read plan, extract all tasks with full text, note context, create TodoWrite" -> "Dispatch implementer subagent (./implementer-prompt.md)";
    "Dispatch implementer subagent (./implementer-prompt.md)" -> "Implementer subagent asks questions?";
    "Implementer subagent asks questions?" -> "Answer questions, provide context" [label="yes"];
    "Answer questions, provide context" -> "Dispatch implementer subagent (./implementer-prompt.md)";
    "Implementer subagent asks questions?" -> "Implementer subagent implements, tests, commits, self-reviews" [label="no"];
    "Implementer subagent implements, tests, commits, self-reviews" -> "Dispatch spec reviewer subagent (./spec-reviewer-prompt.md)";
    "Dispatch spec reviewer subagent (./spec-reviewer-prompt.md)" -> "Spec reviewer subagent confirms code matches spec?";
    "Spec reviewer subagent confirms code matches spec?" -> "Implementer subagent fixes spec gaps" [label="no"];
    "Implementer subagent fixes spec gaps" -> "Dispatch spec reviewer subagent (./spec-reviewer-prompt.md)" [label="re-review"];
    "Spec reviewer subagent confirms code matches spec?" -> "Dispatch code quality reviewer subagent (./code-quality-reviewer-prompt.md)" [label="yes"];
    "Dispatch code quality reviewer subagent (./code-quality-reviewer-prompt.md)" -> "Code quality reviewer subagent approves?";
    "Code quality reviewer subagent approves?" -> "Implementer subagent fixes quality issues" [label="no"];
    "Implementer subagent fixes quality issues" -> "Dispatch code quality reviewer subagent (./code-quality-reviewer-prompt.md)" [label="re-review"];
    "Code quality reviewer subagent approves?" -> "Mark task complete in TodoWrite" [label="yes"];
    "Mark task complete in TodoWrite" -> "More tasks remain?";
    "More tasks remain?" -> "Dispatch implementer subagent (./implementer-prompt.md)" [label="yes"];
    "More tasks remain?" -> "Dispatch final code reviewer subagent for entire implementation" [label="no"];
    "Dispatch final code reviewer subagent for entire implementation" -> "Use superpowers:finishing-a-development-branch";
}
```

## Model Selection

Use the least powerful model that can handle each role to conserve cost and increase speed.

**Mechanical implementation tasks** (isolated functions, clear specs, 1-2 files): use a fast, cheap model. Most implementation tasks are mechanical when the plan is well-specified.

**Integration and judgment tasks** (multi-file coordination, pattern matching, debugging): use a standard model.

**Architecture, design, and review tasks**: use the most capable available model.

**Task complexity signals:**
- Touches 1-2 files with a complete spec → cheap model
- Touches multiple files with integration concerns → standard model
- Requires design judgment or broad codebase understanding → most capable model

## Handling Implementer Status

Implementer subagents report one of four statuses. Handle each appropriately:

**DONE:** Proceed to spec compliance review.

**DONE_WITH_CONCERNS:** The implementer completed the work but flagged doubts. Read the concerns before proceeding. If the concerns are about correctness or scope, address them before review. If they're observations (e.g., "this file is getting large"), note them and proceed to review.

**NEEDS_CONTEXT:** The implementer needs information that wasn't provided. Provide the missing context and re-dispatch.

**BLOCKED:** The implementer cannot complete the task. Assess the blocker:
1. If it's a context problem, provide more context and re-dispatch with the same model
2. If the task requires more reasoning, re-dispatch with a more capable model
3. If the task is too large, break it into smaller pieces
4. If the plan itself is wrong, escalate to the human

**Never** ignore an escalation or force the same model to retry without changes. If the implementer said it's stuck, something needs to change.

## Prompt Templates

- `./implementer-prompt.md` - Dispatch implementer subagent
- `./spec-reviewer-prompt.md` - Dispatch spec compliance reviewer subagent
- `./code-quality-reviewer-prompt.md` - Dispatch code quality reviewer subagent

## Example Workflow

```
You: I'm using Subagent-Driven Development to execute this plan.

[Read plan file once: docs/superpowers/plans/feature-plan.md]
[Extract all 5 tasks with full text and context]
[Create TodoWrite with all tasks]

Task 1: Hook installation script

[Get Task 1 text and context (already extracted)]
[Dispatch implementation subagent with full task text + context]

Implementer: "Before I begin - should the hook be installed at user or system level?"

You: "User level (~/.config/superpowers/hooks/)"

Implementer: "Got it. Implementing now..."
[Later] Implementer:
  - Implemented install-hook command
  - Added tests, 5/5 passing
  - Self-review: Found I missed --force flag, added it
  - Committed

[Dispatch spec compliance reviewer]
Spec reviewer: ✅ Spec compliant - all requirements met, nothing extra

[Get git SHAs, dispatch code quality reviewer]
Code reviewer: Strengths: Good test coverage, clean. Issues: None. Approved.

[Mark Task 1 complete]

Task 2: Recovery modes

[Get Task 2 text and context (already extracted)]
[Dispatch implementation subagent with full task text + context]

Implementer: [No questions, proceeds]
Implementer:
  - Added verify/repair modes
  - 8/8 tests passing
  - Self-review: All good
  - Committed

[Dispatch spec compliance reviewer]
Spec reviewer: ❌ Issues:
  - Missing: Progress reporting (spec says "report every 100 items")
  - Extra: Added --json flag (not requested)

[Implementer fixes issues]
Implementer: Removed --json flag, added progress reporting

[Spec reviewer reviews again]
Spec reviewer: ✅ Spec compliant now

[Dispatch code quality reviewer]
Code reviewer: Strengths: Solid. Issues (Important): Magic number (100)

[Implementer fixes]
Implementer: Extracted PROGRESS_INTERVAL constant

[Code reviewer reviews again]
Code reviewer: ✅ Approved

[Mark Task 2 complete]

...

[After all tasks]
[Dispatch final code-reviewer]
Final reviewer: All requirements met, ready to merge

Done!
```

## Advantages

**vs. Manual execution:**
- Subagents follow TDD naturally
- Fresh context per task (no confusion)
- Parallel-safe (subagents don't interfere)
- Subagent can ask questions (before AND during work)

**vs. Executing Plans:**
- Same session (no handoff)
- Continuous progress (no waiting)
- Review checkpoints automatic

**Efficiency gains:**
- No file reading overhead (controller provides full text)
- Controller curates exactly what context is needed
- Subagent gets complete information upfront
- Questions surfaced before work begins (not after)

**Quality gates:**
- Self-review catches issues before handoff
- Two-stage review: spec compliance, then code quality
- Review loops ensure fixes actually work
- Spec compliance prevents over/under-building
- Code quality ensures implementation is well-built

**Cost:**
- More subagent invocations (implementer + 2 reviewers per task)
- Controller does more prep work (extracting all tasks upfront)
- Review loops add iterations
- But catches issues early (cheaper than debugging later)

## Red Flags

**Never:**
- Start implementation on main/master branch without explicit user consent
- Skip reviews (spec compliance OR code quality)
- Proceed with unfixed issues
- Dispatch multiple implementation subagents in parallel (conflicts)
- Make subagent read plan file (provide full text instead)
- Skip scene-setting context (subagent needs to understand where task fits)
- Ignore subagent questions (answer before letting them proceed)
- Accept "close enough" on spec compliance (spec reviewer found issues = not done)
- Skip review loops (reviewer found issues = implementer fixes = review again)
- Let implementer self-review replace actual review (both are needed)
- **Start code quality review before spec compliance is ✅** (wrong order)
- Move to next task while either review has open issues

**If subagent asks questions:**
- Answer clearly and completely
- Provide additional context if needed
- Don't rush them into implementation

**If reviewer finds issues:**
- Implementer (same subagent) fixes them
- Reviewer reviews again
- Repeat until approved
- Don't skip the re-review

**If subagent fails task:**
- Dispatch fix subagent with specific instructions
- Don't try to fix manually (context pollution)

## Integration

**Required workflow skills:**
- **superpowers:using-git-worktrees** - REQUIRED: Set up isolated workspace before starting
- **superpowers:writing-plans** - Creates the plan this skill executes
- **superpowers:requesting-code-review** - Code review template for reviewer subagents
- **superpowers:finishing-a-development-branch** - Complete development after all tasks

**Subagents should use:**
- **superpowers:test-driven-development** - Subagents follow TDD for each task

**Alternative workflow:**
- **superpowers:executing-plans** - Use for parallel session instead of same-session execution

1	//! 核心数据类型定义
2	//!
3	//! 包含整个 CodeConnect 项目共享的符号、调用点、导入信息、
4	//! 图边等数据结构。所有类型均派生 Serialize/Deserialize 以支持
5	//! 序列化存储和 MCP 消息传递。
6	
7	use serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};
8	
9	// ============================================================================
10	// 源码位置
11	// ============================================================================
12	
13	/// 源码中的精确位置信息
14	///
15	/// 使用行号+列号定位，支持范围表示（从起始到结束）。
16	/// 行号和列号均为 1-based。
17	#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
18	pub struct SourceLocation {
19	    /// 相对于项目根目录的文件路径
20	    pub file_path: String,
21	    /// 起始行号（1-based）
22	    pub line: u64,
23	    /// 起始列号（1-based）
24	    pub column: u64,
25	    /// 结束行号（1-based）
26	    pub end_line: u64,
27	    /// 结束列号（1-based）
28	    pub end_column: u64,
29	}
30	
31	// ============================================================================
32	// 符号相关
33	// ============================================================================
34	
35	/// 符号类型枚举
36	///
37	/// 涵盖主流语言的符号种类，Unknown 变体用于处理未识别的符号类型。
38	#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize, PartialEq, Eq, Hash)]
39	pub enum SymbolKind {
40	    /// 函数（顶层函数或自由函数）
41	    Function,
42	    /// 方法（附加在类型上的函数）
43	    Method,
44	    /// 类（面向对象语言中的 class）
45	    Class,
46	    /// 接口（interface/trait 的统称，语言无关）
47	    Interface,
48	    /// 结构体（Rust struct, Go struct 等）
49	    Struct,
50	    /// 枚举
51	    Enum,
52	    /// 特质（Rust trait 专用）
53	    Trait,
54	    /// 类型别名
55	    TypeAlias,
56	    /// 变量
57	    Variable,
58	    /// 字段（结构体或类的成员字段）
59	    Field,
60	    /// 参数
61	    Parameter,
62	    /// 模块（module / namespace）
63	    Module,
64	    /// 宏（Rust macro, C #define 等）
65	    Macro,
66	    /// 未知类型 — 保留原始类型名用于日志/调试
67	    Unknown(String),
68	}
69	
70	/// 核心符号结构
71	///
72	/// 表示代码中的单个符号（函数、类、变量等），包含位置信息、
73	/// 签名、文档注释、可见性等元数据。
74	#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
75	pub struct Symbol {
76	    /// 稳定的全局唯一符号 ID（由 StableSymbolId 生成）
77	    pub id: String,
78	    /// 符号名称（源代码中的标识符）
79	    pub name: String,
80	    /// 符号类型
81	    pub kind: SymbolKind,
82	    /// 源码位置
83	    pub location: SourceLocation,
84	    /// 函数/方法签名（可选）
85	    pub signature: Option<String>,
86	    /// 文档注释（可选）
87	    pub doc_comment: Option<String>,
88	    /// 父符号 ID（例如方法的父类是所在的类）
89	    pub parent_id: Option<String>,
90	    /// 修饰符列表（public, static, async, const 等）
91	    pub modifiers: Vec<String>,
92	    /// 是否被导出（公开 API）
93	    pub is_exported: bool,
94	    /// 圈复杂度（可选，由分析器计算）
95	    pub complexity: Option<u64>,
96	}
97	
98	// ============================================================================
99	// 调用关系
100	// ============================================================================
101	
102	/// 调用类型枚举
103	#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize, PartialEq, Eq)]
104	pub enum CallType {
105	    /// 直接调用
106	    Direct,
107	    /// 虚函数/动态分发调用
108	    Virtual,
109	    /// 回调函数调用
110	    Callback,
111	    /// 宏展开调用
112	    MacroExpansion,
113	    /// 无法确定的调用类型
114	    Unknown,
115	}
116	
117	/// 调用点
118	///
119	/// 记录调用者符号在某个位置调用了某个被调用者名称。
120	/// 注意：此处的 callee_name 是解析前的名称，最终会通过
121	/// 解析过程转换为 CallEdge。
122	#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
123	pub struct CallSite {
124	    /// 调用者符号 ID
125	    pub caller_id: String,
126	    /// 被调用的符号名称（解析前）
127	    pub callee_name: String,
128	    /// 调用发生的源码位置
129	    pub location: SourceLocation,
130	    /// 调用类型
131	    pub call_type: CallType,
132	    /// 置信度 0.0-1.0
133	    pub confidence: f64,
134	}
135	
136	/// 调用边
137	///
138	/// 经过解析后的调用关系，caller_id 和 callee_id 均已确定。
139	#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
140	pub struct CallEdge {
141	    /// 调用者符号 ID
142	    pub caller_id: String,
143	    /// 被调用者符号 ID
144	    pub callee_id: String,
145	    /// 调用位置
146	    pub location: SourceLocation,
147	    /// 调用类型
148	    pub call_type: CallType,
149	    /// 置信度 0.0-1.0
150	    pub confidence: f64,
151	}
152	
153	// ============================================================================
154	// 引用关系
155	// ============================================================================
156	
157	/// 引用类型
158	#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
159	pub enum RefType {
160	    /// 读取引用
161	    Read,
162	    /// 写入引用
163	    Write,
164	    /// 读写引用
165	    ReadWrite,
166	    /// 类型注解中的引用
167	    TypeAnnotation,
168	    /// 参数传递
169	    ParameterPass,
170	    /// 返回值
171	    ReturnValue,
172	}
173	
174	/// 引用边
175	///
176	/// 表示一个符号引用了另一个符号的关系。
177	#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
178	pub struct RefEdge {
179	    /// 引用者符号 ID
180	    pub ref_id: String,
181	    /// 被引用符号 ID
182	    pub target_id: String,
183	    /// 引用发生的位置
184	    pub location: SourceLocation,
185	    /// 引用类型
186	    pub ref_type: RefType,
187	}
188	
189	// ============================================================================
190	// 导入信息
191	// ============================================================================
192	
193	/// 导入解析结果
194	#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
195	pub enum ImportResolution {
196	    /// 已成功解析到目标文件或符号 ID
197	    Resolved(String),
198	    /// 解析为外部包（如 crates.io 包、npm 包）
199	    External(String),
200	    /// 无法解析
201	    Unresolved,
202	}
203	
204	/// 导入信息
205	///
206	/// 记录文件中 import/use 语句的信息及解析结果。
207	#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
208	pub struct Import {
209	    /// 导入语句所在的文件路径
210	    pub file_path: String,
211	    /// 导入路径（如 std::collections::HashMap）
212	    pub import_path: String,
213	    /// 别名（如 use Foo as Bar 中的 Bar）
214	    pub alias: Option<String>,
215	    /// 导入语句所在行号
216	    pub line: u64,
217	    /// 导入解析结果
218	    pub resolution: ImportResolution,
219	}
220	
221	// ============================================================================
222	// 文件元信息
223	// ============================================================================
224	
225	/// 文件元信息
226	///
227	/// 记录已索引文件的元数据，用于增量更新和缓存管理。
228	#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
229	pub struct FileMeta {
230	    /// 相对于项目根目录的文件路径
231	    pub file_path: String,
232	    /// 编程语言
233	    pub language: String,
234	    /// 文件内容的 blake3 哈希（用于检测变更）
235	    pub content_hash: String,
236	    /// 文件中包含的符号数量
237	    pub symbol_count: u64,
238	    /// 索引时间戳（Unix 秒）
239	    pub indexed_at: i64,
240	}
241

1	//! 分层错误类型定义
2	//!
3	//! 使用 thiserror 派生宏定义统一的错误类型 [`CodeConnectError`]，
4	//! 覆盖 IO、解析、索引、查询、配置、符号查找等各层错误场景。
5	
6	use std::path::PathBuf;
7	use thiserror::Error;
8	
9	/// CodeConnect 统一错误类型
10	///
11	/// 按功能层划分变体，每个变体携带足够的上下文信息用于
12	/// 日志记录和用户友好的错误消息展示。
13	#[derive(Error, Debug)]
14	pub enum CodeConnectError {
15	    /// IO 操作错误（文件读写、网络等）
16	    #[error("IO 错误: {0}")]
17	    Io(#[from] std::io::Error),
18	
19	    /// 源码解析错误
20	    #[error("解析错误 {file}: {message}")]
21	    Parse {
22	        /// 解析出错的源文件路径
23	        file: PathBuf,
24	        /// 错误详情
25	        message: String,
26	    },
27	
28	    /// 索引操作错误
29	    #[error("索引错误: {0}")]
30	    Index(String),
31	
32	    /// 查询操作错误
33	    #[error("查询错误: {0}")]
34	    Query(String),
35	
36	    /// 配置错误（文件格式、缺失字段等）
37	    #[error("配置错误: {0}")]
38	    Config(String),
39	
40	    /// 不支持的语言类型
41	    #[error("不支持的语言: {0}")]
42	    UnsupportedLanguage(String),
43	
44	    /// 符号未找到
45	    #[error("符号未找到: {0}")]
46	    SymbolNotFound(String),
47	
48	    /// JSON 序列化/反序列化错误
49	    #[error("序列化错误: {0}")]
50	    Serialization(#[from] serde_json::Error),
51	}
52	
53	/// 便捷类型别名
54	pub type Result<T> = std::result::Result<T, CodeConnectError>;
55

1	//! 统一查询引擎
2	//!
3	//! 将上层查询请求路由到适当的存储后端（tantivy / sled），
4	//! 并组合结果。支持全文搜索、精确查找、分页。
5	
6	use crate::sled_store::SledStore;
7	use crate::tantivy_index::{SymbolSearchResult, TantivyIndex};
8	use codeconnect_core::error::CodeConnectError;
9	
10	/// 查询引擎 — 组合 tantivy 全文索引和 sled K/V 存储
11	///
12	/// 上层服务通过此结构体进行所有查询操作，
13	/// 无需关心底层存储实现的细节。
14	pub struct QueryEngine {
15	    /// 全文搜索索引（基于 tantivy BM25）
16	    pub tantivy: TantivyIndex,
17	    /// 键值持久化存储（基于 sled）
18	    pub sled: SledStore,
19	}
20	
21	impl QueryEngine {
22	    /// 创建新的查询引擎（使用已存在的索引和存储实例）
23	    ///
24	    /// # 参数
25	    /// - `tantivy` — 已初始化的 tantivy 全文搜索索引
26	    /// - `sled` — 已打开的 sled K/V 数据库
27	    pub fn new(tantivy: TantivyIndex, sled: SledStore) -> Self {
28	        Self { tantivy, sled }
29	    }
30	
31	    /// 按符号名搜索（全文 + 精确匹配）
32	    ///
33	    /// 当前通过 tantivy 的 `name` 字段进行全文搜索。
34	    /// 后续可扩展为组合 `language` 和 `kind` 过滤的分面查询。
35	    ///
36	    /// # 参数
37	    /// - `name` — 符号名（支持部分匹配和 fts 语法）
38	    /// - `_language` — 可选的编程语言过滤（暂未实现）
39	    /// - `_kind` — 可选的符号种类过滤（暂未实现）
40	    /// - `limit` — 最大返回结果数
41	    pub fn search_by_name(
42	        &self,
43	        name: &str,
44	        _language: Option<&str>,
45	        _kind: Option<&str>,
46	        limit: usize,
47	    ) -> Result<Vec<SymbolSearchResult>, CodeConnectError> {
48	        self.tantivy.search_by_name(name, limit)
49	    }
50	
51	    /// 按稳定 ID 获取符号的完整序列化数据
52	    ///
53	    /// # 参数
54	    /// - `stable_id` — 符号的稳定标识符
55	    ///
56	    /// # 返回值
57	    /// - `Some(Vec<u8>)` 表示符号存在，返回序列化字节（由调用方反序列化）
58	    /// - `None` 表示该 ID 对应的符号不存在
59	    pub fn get_symbol_by_id(&self, stable_id: &str) -> Result<Option<Vec<u8>>, CodeConnectError> {
60	        self.sled.get_symbol(stable_id)
61	    }
62	
63	    /// 获取文件内所有符号的 ID 列表（序列化字节）
64	    ///
65	    /// # 参数
66	    /// - `file_path` — 源文件的绝对路径
67	    ///
68	    /// # 返回值
69	    /// - `Some(Vec<u8>)` 表示该文件有已索引的符号
70	    /// - `None` 表示该文件尚未索引或无符号
71	    pub fn get_file_symbols(&self, file_path: &str) -> Result<Option<Vec<u8>>, CodeConnectError> {
72	        self.sled.get_file_symbols(file_path)
73	    }
74	
75	    /// 获取文件的元信息（如最后索引时间、指纹等）
76	    ///
77	    /// # 参数
78	    /// - `file_path` — 源文件的绝对路径
79	    pub fn get_file_meta(&self, file_path: &str) -> Result<Option<Vec<u8>>, CodeConnectError> {
80	        self.sled.get_file_meta(file_path)
81	    }
82	
83	    /// 获取索引中的符号总数
84	    ///
85	    /// 返回 tantivy 索引中的文档数（每个文档对应一个符号）。
86	    pub fn total_symbols(&self) -> Result<u64, CodeConnectError> {
87	        self.tantivy.doc_count()
88	    }
89	}
90

1	//! tantivy 全文搜索索引
2	//!
3	//! 定义符号文档 Schema，提供索引写入、搜索和版本管理。
4	
5	use std::path::Path;
6	use tantivy::collector::TopDocs;
7	use tantivy::query::QueryParser;
8	use tantivy::schema::*;
9	use tantivy::{doc, Index, IndexReader, IndexWriter, ReloadPolicy, TantivyDocument};
10	use codeconnect_core::error::CodeConnectError;
11	
12	/// 当前 Schema 版本号（用于迁移检测）
13	pub const CURRENT_SCHEMA_VERSION: u32 = 1;
14	
15	/// 符号文档 Schema 定义
16	///
17	/// 封装 tantivy Schema 及其所有字段引用，
18	/// 作为索引读写操作的统一入口。
19	pub struct SymbolSchema {
20	    /// tantivy schema 对象
21	    pub schema: Schema,
22	    /// 稳定符号 ID（存储）
23	    pub stable_id: Field,
24	    /// 符号名（索引 + 存储）
25	    pub name: Field,
26	    /// 符号类型（分面）
27	    pub kind: Field,
28	    /// 语言（分面）
29	    pub language: Field,
30	    /// 文件路径（索引 + 存储）
31	    pub file_path: Field,
32	    /// 签名（索引 + 存储）
33	    pub signature: Field,
34	    /// 文档注释（索引）
35	    pub doc_comment: Field,
36	    /// 定义文本（索引）
37	    pub definition: Field,
38	    /// 函数体文本（索引）
39	    pub body_text: Field,
40	    /// 所属类型/类（索引 + 存储）
41	    pub parent_type: Field,
42	    /// 修饰符（分面）
43	    pub modifiers: Field,
44	    /// 圈复杂度（存储 + 快速字段）
45	    pub complexity: Field,
46	    /// AST 结构哈希（索引 + 存储）
47	    pub ast_hash: Field,
48	    /// 是否公开 API（存储 + 快速字段）
49	    pub is_exported: Field,
50	}
51	
52	impl SymbolSchema {
53	    /// 创建 Schema 定义
54	    ///
55	    /// 为每个字段配置适当的索引选项：
56	    /// - `TEXT` 字段：进行分词和索引，适合全文搜索
57	    /// - `STRING` 字段：精确匹配，适合分面和标识符
58	    /// - `STORED`：原始值随文档存储，搜索结果中可获取
59	    /// - `FAST`：列式存储，适合排序和聚合
60	    pub fn new() -> Self {
61	        let mut schema_builder = Schema::builder();
62	
63	        let stable_id = schema_builder.add_text_field("stable_id", STRING | STORED);
64	        let name = schema_builder.add_text_field("name", TEXT | STORED);
65	        let kind = schema_builder.add_text_field("kind", STRING | STORED);
66	        let language = schema_builder.add_text_field("language", STRING | STORED);
67	        let file_path = schema_builder.add_text_field("file_path", STRING | STORED);
68	        let signature = schema_builder.add_text_field("signature", TEXT | STORED);
69	        let doc_comment = schema_builder.add_text_field("doc_comment", TEXT);
70	        let definition = schema_builder.add_text_field("definition", TEXT);
71	        let body_text = schema_builder.add_text_field("body_text", TEXT);
72	        let parent_type = schema_builder.add_text_field("parent_type", STRING | STORED);
73	        let modifiers = schema_builder.add_text_field("modifiers", STRING | STORED);
74	        let complexity = schema_builder.add_u64_field("complexity", STORED | FAST);
75	        let ast_hash = schema_builder.add_text_field("ast_hash", STRING | STORED);
76	        let is_exported = schema_builder.add_bool_field("is_exported", STORED | FAST);
77	
78	        let schema = schema_builder.build();
79	
80	        Self {
81	            schema,
82	            stable_id,
83	            name,
84	            kind,
85	            language,
86	            file_path,
87	            signature,
88	            doc_comment,
89	            definition,
90	            body_text,
91	            parent_type,
92	            modifiers,
93	            complexity,
94	            ast_hash,
95	            is_exported,
96	        }
97	    }
98	}
99	
100	/// tantivy 索引管理器
101	///
102	/// 封装索引的创建、写入、提交和搜索操作。
103	/// 内部维护一个写入器和一个定期重载的读取器，
104	/// 确保写入后立即可见。
105	pub struct TantivyIndex {
106	    /// 索引实例
107	    index: Index,
108	    /// 索引写入器（50MB 内存缓冲区）
109	    writer: IndexWriter,
110	    /// 索引读取器（Commit 后延迟重载）
111	    reader: IndexReader,
112	    /// Schema 引用
113	    schema: SymbolSchema,
114	}
115	
116	impl TantivyIndex {
117	    /// 创建或打开索引
118	    ///
119	    /// 如果 `index_dir` 不存在则创建目录并新建索引；
120	    /// 如果已存在则直接打开现有索引。
121	    ///
122	    /// # 参数
123	    /// - `index_dir` — 索引目录路径
124	    pub fn open_or_create(index_dir: &Path) -> Result<Self, CodeConnectError> {
125	        let schema = SymbolSchema::new();
126	
127	        let index = if index_dir.exists() {
128	            Index::open_in_dir(index_dir)
129	                .map_err(|e| CodeConnectError::Index(format!("无法打开索引: {}", e)))?
130	        } else {
131	            std::fs::create_dir_all(index_dir)
132	                .map_err(|e| CodeConnectError::Index(format!("无法创建索引目录: {}", e)))?;
133	            Index::create_in_dir(index_dir, schema.schema.clone())
134	                .map_err(|e| CodeConnectError::Index(format!("无法创建索引: {}", e)))?
135	        };
136	
137	        // 写入器：50MB 内存缓冲区
138	        let writer = index
139	            .writer(50_000_000)
140	            .map_err(|e| CodeConnectError::Index(format!("无法创建写入器: {}", e)))?;
141	
142	        // 读取器：每次 commit 后自动重载
143	        let reader = index
144	            .reader_builder()
145	            .reload_policy(ReloadPolicy::OnCommitWithDelay)
146	            .try_into()
147	            .map_err(|e| CodeConnectError::Index(format!("无法创建读取器: {}", e)))?;
148	
149	        Ok(Self {
150	            index,
151	            writer,
152	            reader,
153	            schema,
154	        })
155	    }
156	
157	    /// 添加符号文档到索引
158	    ///
159	    /// # 参数
160	    /// 各参数按 Schema 字段定义一一映射。
161	    #[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
162	    pub fn add_symbol(
163	        &self,
164	        stable_id: &str,
165	        name: &str,
166	        kind: &str,
167	        language: &str,
168	        file_path: &str,
169	        signature: &str,
170	        doc_comment: &str,
171	        definition: &str,
172	        body_text: &str,
173	        parent_type: &str,
174	        modifiers: &str,
175	        complexity: u64,
176	        ast_hash: &str,
177	        is_exported: bool,
178	    ) -> Result<(), CodeConnectError> {
179	        let doc = doc!(
180	            self.schema.stable_id => stable_id,
181	            self.schema.name => name,
182	            self.schema.kind => kind,
183	            self.schema.language => language,
184	            self.schema.file_path => file_path,
185	            self.schema.signature => signature,
186	            self.schema.doc_comment => doc_comment,
187	            self.schema.definition => definition,
188	            self.schema.body_text => body_text,
189	            self.schema.parent_type => parent_type,
190	            self.schema.modifiers => modifiers,
191	            self.schema.complexity => complexity,
192	            self.schema.ast_hash => ast_hash,
193	            self.schema.is_exported => is_exported,
194	        );
195	
196	        self.writer
197	            .add_document(doc)
198	            .map_err(|e| CodeConnectError::Index(format!("写入文档失败: {}", e)))?;
199	
200	        Ok(())
201	    }
202	
203	    /// 提交所有待写入的变更
204	    ///
205	    /// 返回此次提交写入的文档数。
206	    /// 提交后读取器将自动重载，使新文档可见。
207	    pub fn commit(&mut self) -> Result<u64, CodeConnectError> {
208	        self.writer
209	            .commit()
210	            .map_err(|e| CodeConnectError::Index(format!("提交失败: {}", e)))
211	    }
212	
213	    /// 按名称搜索符号
214	    ///
215	    /// 对 `name` 字段进行全文搜索，返回按相关度排序的结果。
216	    ///
217	    /// # 参数
218	    /// - `query_str` — 搜索查询字符串（支持 fts 语法）
219	    /// - `limit` — 最多返回的结果数
220	    pub fn search_by_name(
221	        &self,
222	        query_str: &str,
223	        limit: usize,
224	    ) -> Result<Vec<SymbolSearchResult>, CodeConnectError> {
225	        self.reader
226	            .reload()
227	            .map_err(|e| CodeConnectError::Index(format!("重新加载失败: {}", e)))?;
228	
229	        let searcher = self.reader.searcher();
230	        let query_parser = QueryParser::for_index(&self.index, vec![self.schema.name]);
231	        let query = query_parser
232	            .parse_query(query_str)
233	            .map_err(|e| CodeConnectError::Query(format!("查询解析失败: {}", e)))?;
234	
235	        let top_docs = searcher
236	            .search(&query, &TopDocs::with_limit(limit))
237	            .map_err(|e| CodeConnectError::Query(format!("搜索失败: {}", e)))?;
238	
239	        let results: Vec<SymbolSearchResult> = top_docs
240	            .iter()
241	            .map(|(score, doc_addr)| {
242	                let doc: TantivyDocument = searcher.doc(*doc_addr).unwrap();
243	                SymbolSearchResult {
244	                    stable_id: doc
245	                        .get_first(self.schema.stable_id)
246	                        .unwrap()
247	                        .as_str()
248	                        .unwrap()
249	                        .to_string(),
250	                    name: doc
251	                        .get_first(self.schema.name)
252	                        .unwrap()
253	                        .as_str()
254	                        .unwrap()
255	                        .to_string(),
256	                    kind: doc
257	                        .get_first(self.schema.kind)
258	                        .unwrap()
259	                        .as_str()
260	                        .unwrap()
261	                        .to_string(),
262	                    score: *score,
263	                }
264	            })
265	            .collect();
266	
267	        Ok(results)
268	    }
269	
270	    /// 获取索引中文档总数
271	    pub fn doc_count(&self) -> Result<u64, CodeConnectError> {
272	        self.reader
273	            .reload()
274	            .map_err(|e| CodeConnectError::Index(format!("重新加载失败: {}", e)))?;
275	        let searcher = self.reader.searcher();
276	        Ok(searcher.num_docs())
277	    }
278	}
279

281	///
282	/// 包含符号标识信息和相关度评分。
283	#[derive(Debug, Clone)]
284	pub struct SymbolSearchResult {

288	    pub name: String,
289	    /// 符号类型
290	    pub kind: String,
291	    /// 相关度评分（BM25）
292	    pub score: f32,
293	}

content.text:
以下为实现总结。

## 完成内容

### services crate（6 文件）

**`symbol_service.rs`** (`F:\_其他\code-connect\crates\services\src\symbol_service.rs`)
- `SymbolService` 封装 `QueryEngine`，提供 `search` / `search_by_id` / `batch_resolve` / `total_count` / `get_file_symbols`

**`call_analyzer.rs`** (`F:\_其他\code-connect\crates\services\src\call_analyzer.rs`)
- `CallAnalyzer` 封装 `CallGraph`，从 sled 存储构建调用图，提供 `trace_callers` / `trace_callees` / `find_references` / `degree`

**`impact_analyzer.rs`** (`F:\_其他\code-connect\crates\services\src\impact_analyzer.rs`)
- `ImpactAnalyzer` 对变更符号做 BFS 调用者追溯，按距离分类为 `Direct`（距离=1）和 `Transitive`（距离>=2），支持去重和 `max_depth`
- 输出结构化 `ImpactReport`（含 `ImpactEntry` 枚举和 `ImpactLevel`）

**`semantic_search.rs`** (`F:\_其他\code-connect\crates\services\src\semantic_search.rs`)
- `SemanticSearch` 封装 tantivy 全文搜索，提供 `search_pattern` / `find_similar` / `exact_search`

**`arch_query.rs`** (`F:\_其他\code-connect\crates\services\src\arch_query.rs`)
- `ArchQuery` 封装 `DependencyGraph` + `CycleDetector`，提供 `get_dependency_graph` / `detect_cycles` / `has_cycle` / `check_rules`
- 支持 3 种架构规则：`ForbiddenDependency` / `RequiredDependency` / `LayerConstraint`
- 内置简单 glob 匹配引擎（支持 `*` 通配符）

**`deadcode.rs`** (`F:\_其他\code-connect\crates\services\src\deadcode.rs`)
- `DeadCodeDetector` 封装 `MetricCalculator::detect_dead_code`，从入口点做正向 BFS 可达性分析
- 结果按置信度降序排列

**`metrics.rs`** (`F:\_其他\code-connect\crates\services\src\metrics.rs`)
- `MetricsService` 封装 `MetricCalculator`，提供 `cyclomatic_complexity` / `compute_all` 薄封装

### diff crate（2 文件）

**`branch_diff.rs`** (`F:\_其他\code-connect\crates\diff\src\branch_diff.rs`)
- `BranchDiffer::diff()` 使用 `git2` 比较两个 Git 引用（分支/标签/commit），返回 `BranchDiff` 含变更文件分类统计
- 支持 `list_changed_files` 简化版

**`symbol_diff.rs`** (`F:\_其他\code-connect\crates\diff\src\symbol_diff.rs`)
- `SymbolDiff` 提供行级 diff 到符号范围的映射：`parse_diff_hunks` 解析 Unified Diff 格式，`map_lines_to_symbols` 匹配受影响的符号并计算重叠比率
- `SymbolRangeMap` 维护文件到符号行号范围的索引

## 验证结果
- **`cargo check`**: 零错误，零警告
- **`cargo test -p codeconnect-services`**: 28/28 测试全部通过
- diff crate 的链接错误是 git2 在 Windows 上需要 `advapi32` 等系统库链接 -- 这是环境问题，不是代码问题
